purpose: Canonical event contract for Every Meal Guide launch analytics.

providerRecommendation.reason: Simple custom events, lightweight setup, privacy-friendly enough for early launch measurement.
providerRecommendation.temporaryProofPath: Client events are also sent to /api/track and logged in Vercel as privacy-safe everymealguide_event records until a full analytics provider is connected.

events.name: page_view
events.whyItMatters: Measures traffic by route and confirms pages are being discovered.

events.name: affiliate_click
events.whyItMatters: Core monetization event that measures outbound commercial intent.

events.name: matcher_submit
events.whyItMatters: Shows whether users engage with the homepage decision helper.

events.name: newsletter_interest
events.whyItMatters: Measures whether deal alerts can become a later email asset.

events.name: partner_redirect_ready
events.whyItMatters: Confirms approved /go/ redirect pages are being reached before merchant handoff.

doNotClaimUntil.analyticsLive: A provider script is connected on the public domain and pageviews are visible. Vercel event logs are temporary proof only.
doNotClaimUntil.monetized: At least one approved affiliate URL is live and an affiliate click is recorded in both site logs and an affiliate dashboard.
doNotClaimUntil.revenueProof: A merchant dashboard shows a visit, conversion, sale, or commission signal.
